title: Hide or display a button based on a condition or formula value
excerpt:

posts.author: arnoldprasad (Arnold P)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be nice to make the Button column visible or not visible based on a condition (such as a status or condition derived from a formula value.

A use case may be if a certain sales margin is reached the user can click a button to send to the client or if margin isn’t reached then click a button to send for approval.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Arnold!

Thanks for your request

Can you let us know if this existing feature request is along the lines of what you’re looking for?

posts.author: arnoldprasad (Arnold P)
posts.cookedHtml: No they are different. One deals with views and columns but my request deals with buttons within the column. My request is more about allowing an action, the click of a button, based on certain conditions of other columns/formulas being met.
